g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in the initial master commit?')
sendPrompt('When do you merge qa into master?')
sendPrompt('How do you handle hotfixes on master?')
sendPrompt('When do you create the qa branch?')
sendPrompt('What happens when QA tests pass?')
sendPrompt('How does a dev branch relate to qa?')
sendPrompt('What kind of commits go on dev?')
sendPrompt('When is dev ready to merge into qa?')
sendPrompt('How do feature branches work off dev?')
